MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Yerba Buena Commons is present. Represented by Mitch Brown.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jan Holmes, is present.
Attorney, Kim Arone , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Feinstein, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 210, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
